parameters.content:
WG PREP — active=false. No Telegram. No Schedule.

Manual path: Set Wg test scenario (fixtures + external_receipt).
Callable path: When Executed by Another Workflow → Normalize Wf47 callable receipt (no Set Wg test scenario) → correlate.

Both paths reach Correlate inbound to decision state via wg_decision_state_test only.
